plugins.name: context-file-hygiene
plugins.description: Audit and trim CLAUDE.md files to minimal behavioral directives

plugins.name: creating-agent-teams
plugins.description: Guide for creating and managing Claude Code agent teams with model selection, communication patterns, and prompt templates

plugins.name: design-system-showcase
plugins.description: Enforces a living component library page — bootstraps it when missing, gates component work until the showcase is updated, and audits for missing entries

plugins.name: content-audit
plugins.description: Multi-persona content audit engine — analyzes writing for clarity, jargon, logical flow, and AI-signature patterns

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: PAS-managed persistent markdown wiki — on first invoke in a project, seeds a customizable llm-wiki process into .pas/processes/ for bootstrap, digest, ingest, query, and lint operations (requires the pas-framework plugin)

plugins.name: llm-wiki-extended
plugins.description: Extends llm-wiki with memory lifecycle, knowledge graph, hybrid search, automation hooks, and quality controls for wikis past ~100 pages
